184616505.en_literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down!

356642702.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
356642702.jp_real: うまく巻き込めたかな
356642702.en_literal: Looks like I got everyone involved.

886789566.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
886789566.jp_real: 手応えありましたね、カタリナさん。
886789566.en_literal: You've got a good grip on things, Katalina!

259686075.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
259686075.jp_real: 魔法の腕に磨きがかかってるね、イオ！
259686075.en_literal: Your magic is getting sharper, Io.
259686075.english: You've gotten real good at spell-slinging, Io!

479361779.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
479361779.jp_real: 砕けた氷の欠片が綺麗で見とれちゃいそうだった
479361779.en_literal: The shattered pieces of ice were so beautiful, I almost couldn't take my eyes off them.
479361779.english: The way you throw that ice around, it was beautiful!

470427358.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1000
470427358.jp_real: ナアチチ！すごい火力だ！

875416313.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1100
875416313.english: Got him on the back foot!

201594234.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
201594234.jp_real: シャルロッテさんの奥義、かっこいいな！
201594234.en_literal: Reginleiv! Overdrive Surge! Rain of Arrows! Armor Break! Decimate! Diastrophism! Tempest Blade!
201594234.english: Still one of the coolest attacks I've ever seen!

245073762.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
245073762.jp_real: あの速度で切り刻まれたら、ひとたまりもないはず！
245073762.en_literal: If I get hit by that speed, I won't stand a chance.
245073762.english: How many cuts was that? Lost count around ten.

266568542.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
266568542.jp_real: ナルメアさん、かっこよかったよ！

193717830.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
193717830.jp_real: すごい！これが伝説の拳！
193717830.en_literal: Amazing... so this is the legendary fist!
193717830.english: Amazing! He really is a legend!

49446413.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
49446413.jp_real: バザラガさん、助かりました！

219281193.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
219281193.jp_real: 今のは良かったよ、イド！

357751562.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
357751562.jp_real: さすがはサンダルフォンだね！
357751562.english: That's why they call you Supreme!

108598687.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
108598687.jp_real: シエテさん、すごかった！

7947978.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
7947978.jp_real: ガランツァ、張り切ってるな！

1072777420.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
1072777420.jp_real: 繋いでくれるって信じてたよ
1072777420.en_literal: I believed you'd link up with me.
1072777420.english: I knew you wouldn't let me down!

878363592.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
878363592.jp_real: タイミングバッチリでした！

713187972.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
713187972.jp_real: フラメク、なんて威力だ！

351167175.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
351167175.jp_real: バッチリ決まってました！
351167175.english: No one does it like us!

449541532.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
449541532.jp_real: はい！みんなのおかげです！
449541532.en_literal: Yes! It's all thanks to everyone!

376924079.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
376924079.jp_real: フェリとペットたちのおかげだよ！
376924079.en_literal: Thanks to Ferry and the pets!
376924079.english: A little training goes a long way!

797222877.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0800
797222877.en_literal: Alright, let's go with this momentum!
797222877.english: Plenty more where that came from!

588614928.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
588614928.en_literal: You've got a good grip on this!

634135249.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
634135249.jp_real: グラン：ボクタチナラカテル！

75342147.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
75342147.jp_real: ジークフリートさんこそ！
75342147.english: Not as good as you, Siegfried!

483157660.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
483157660.jp_real: シャルロッテさんもね
483157660.english: I was just thinking the same thing!

1071677801.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400

1071677801.en_literal: Alright! Let's keep this momentum going!

969845737.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
969845737.en_literal: I'm coming in with full force!

161895062.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600

112889944.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700

175131198.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900

175131198.en_literal: Let's combine our powers and do our best!

494361338.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100

995854118.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200

214725699.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300

233056385.label: PL0000_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400

395911501.en_literal: Even if you don't tell me!

618860679.en_literal: I don't need to be told!

592665597.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL0700
592665597.en_literal: I'll decide it all at once!

482879289.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL0900
482879289.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

479606159.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_la_C_PL1500

423954312.en_literal: I'm guessing this is how it feels!

924581652.en_literal: Let's do it all at once!

125875738.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
125875738.jp_real: 風を操る聖槍士、今日お手付きだ！
125875738.en_literal: Wind-wielding holy warrior, I'll crush you!
125875738.english: We've beat wind primals before! We can do it again!

748993436.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
748993436.en_literal: Let's charge ahead with this momentum!

277067661.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
277067661.jp_real: グランサイフォンを傷つけるな！
277067661.en_literal: Don't you dare hurt Gran Saver!

473468145.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
473468145.jp_real: ここで足止めされてたまるか！
473468145.en_literal: You think you can stop me here?

179189959.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
179189959.jp_real: みんな！この調子で行こう！

259258044.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
259258044.jp_real: 負けんか！死角からの攻撃に注意して！
259258044.en_literal: You're in for a fight! Be careful of attacks from the corners!
259258044.english: Those swords are killer! Cover each other's backs!

524348450.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_A
524348450.en_literal: There must be a way to win!

136821840.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
136821840.en_literal: Just 'cause I've got a lot of swords?

179904671.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST

179904671.en_literal: I won't hand over the food to you!

585984661.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
585984661.english: How do we fight this moving castle!

590087851.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A

590087851.en_literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down!

254947265.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
254947265.jp_real: イッキュリ！あと少しだ！
254947265.en_literal: I can do it! Just a little more!
254947265.english: We've got this! Just a little more!

183827186.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A

183827186.english: We don't have time to mess around!

814066022.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B

814066022.english: Concentrate and we can win this!

398281170.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
398281170.jp_real: ボクタチノジャマウスルナ!

576548285.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
576548285.en_literal: If we're linking, then even we can do it!
576548285.english: Our crew fights for what's right!

41240006.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
41240006.jp_real: これがボクたちのチカラだ！

560780073.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
560780073.jp_real: このまま攻め続けよう！

359823590.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B

359823590.en_literal: I'll go ahead and lead the way! Let's go!
359823590.english: Okay, Id. You asked for it!

763671271.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
763671271.en_literal: I won't let you get away with this!
763671271.english: You've held us back long enough!

525549940.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
525549940.en_literal: What is this power... just what is it?!

817695534.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST

817695534.en_literal: There must be a way through!

435397983.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
435397983.en_literal: I can do it! I'll crush this!

585048401.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
585048401.english: Victory is ours for the taking!

81764417.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C

81764417.english: We've come too far to back down now!

139385781.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST

139385781.english: Furycane! We beat you once, we'll do it again!

198763315.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A

207737196.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B

207737196.en_literal: I'll do what needs to be done!

348792776.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
348792776.jp_real: タッチアダカルなら倒すだけだ！
348792776.en_literal: If I have to fight him, I'll just defeat him!

796098337.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
796098337.jp_real: やっぱりあの時の聖晶獣とは違う
796098337.en_literal: Still, it's different from that time's Holy Arrow.
796098337.english: Is it just me, or does this primal seem more sinister than last time?

237469704.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_C
237469704.en_literal: I'll charge ahead with this momentum!

137206234.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
137206234.jp_real: ガランツァに負けていられない！
137206234.en_literal: I can't afford to lose to Gallanza!
137206234.english: We can't let Ghandagoza outdo us!

1064695697.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
1064695697.jp_real: ボキタチナラヤレルハズダ！

443506734.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
443506734.en_literal: Let's break through with this momentum!

380269477.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
380269477.jp_real: 躊躇してる場合じゃない!
380269477.en_literal: Now's not the time to hesitate!
380269477.english: Fear won't ever hold us back!

345535064.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
345535064.jp_real: すべてをかけて、倒してみせる！
345535064.en_literal: I'll show you how to defeat it!
345535064.english: It's all on us, team! Let's go!

309565122.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
309565122.jp_real: 何が何でも食い止めよ！
309565122.en_literal: I'll stop you no matter what!
309565122.english: We have to stop ongrumine you!

10331040.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C

476859580.en_literal: I won't let you have your way!

950411075.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST

950411075.en_literal: I won't let you get away!

532544943.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST

865177290.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
865177290.en_literal: I can't afford to lose either!
865177290.english: Wow, I wish I could do that!

901835332.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
901835332.jp_real: 今、いい匂いがふわって
901835332.en_literal: I smell something good right now...

317897946.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
317897946.en_literal: So this is... the will of darkness?

767328721.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_2
767328721.en_literal: Leave the next one to me!

18966134.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
18966134.english: There's more where that came from!

26123585.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
26123585.jp_real: このままいきましょう！

90390530.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
90390530.jp_real: ありがとうございます、ロゼッタさん。

86703766.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
86703766.jp_real: パーシヴァル！次も合わせよう！
86703766.english: I've been working on my technique.

848705587.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
848705587.english: Like a lot or just a little?

330413845.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
330413845.jp_real: ありがとうございます！ヨダルラーハさん！

606589439.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
606589439.jp_real: ありがとう、カリオストロ

426237716.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
426237716.en_literal: Heh heh... Man, you're really something, Sandalphon!

1072177469.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
1072177469.jp_real: ありがとうございます！シエテさん！

764683540.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
764683540.en_literal: Yeah! It's been a pleasure fighting alongside you!
764683540.english: Heh heh, I could say the same to you!

892134894.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
892134894.jp_real: こちらこそです、フラウさん。
892134894.en_literal: The pleasure is all mine, Fraux!
892134894.english: Couldn't do it without you, Fraux!

271458961.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
271458961.jp_real: このままいきましょう！フィディエルさん！
271458961.en_literal: Let's keep going like this, Fediel!
271458961.english: You keep it up too, Fediel!

163765847.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0000
163765847.jp_real: ルリア、無理しちゃだめだよ
163765847.en_literal: Lyria, you can't push yourself too hard.

890963384.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
890963384.jp_real: ありがとうございます！

758872986.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
758872986.jp_real: 了解です！オイゲンさん！

271548938.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
271548938.jp_real: 次もこの感じで行こう！

520329325.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
520329325.jp_real: ランスロットのおかげだよ！

834798079.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
834798079.jp_real: ヨダルラーハ、どんどん行きます！
834798079.english: Literally! Not even I could spot you!

870381224.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
870381224.english: Aww, I bet you say that to all the skyfarers.

212920805.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
212920805.english: Can I get back to you later?

867277557.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
867277557.en_literal: I don't need to be told!
867277557.english: You don't have to tell me twice!

335541378.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
335541378.jp_real: わかった！合わせてみせる！
335541378.en_literal: Got it! Let's show them together!
335541378.english: Right! I'll hit 'em even harder next time!

308909732.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
308909732.jp_real: はい！次も任せてください！
308909732.en_literal: Yes! Leave the next one to me!

236440667.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
236440667.jp_real: よろしく頼むよ、ガランツァ
236440667.english: Glad to have you with us, Gallanza!

142363946.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
142363946.en_literal: This is what I aim for!

722526303.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
722526303.jp_real: 次も合わせて見せます！
722526303.en_literal: I'll show you my next move too!

212214728.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
212214728.jp_real: 勢いに乗らせてもらいました！

797637938.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
797637938.jp_real: フェディエル、大丈夫かな？

927743740.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0000
927743740.english: You're already that and more, Lyria!

1002004302.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
1002004302.jp_real: イェー！ローランさんのおかげです！

444272277.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
444272277.english: Who do you take me for?

914949544.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
914949544.english: Come on, how often have you saved my hide?

308628854.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
308628854.jp_real: ヴェイン、ボクも続けよう！

319843297.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
319843297.jp_real: はい！ジークフリートさん！

410872971.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
410872971.jp_real: シャルロッテさん、かっこいいな！
410872971.english: I wanna be like her when I grow up.

612602823.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
612602823.english: I'm not a toddler, you know.

955964595.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
955964595.jp_real: ナルメアさん、やっぱり凄いや！

901744313.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
901744313.en_literal: As expected, this is the ultimate route.

20838109.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
20838109.english: And I'll be right behind ya!

731615293.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
731615293.jp_real: む、無茶だけはしないでよ
731615293.english: Wait, that was fun for you?

445992991.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
445992991.english: So, do you ever smile or...?

735265612.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
735265612.jp_real: ダンチョウ、ダンチョウ。あ、はい。

804546937.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
804546937.en_literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down.

920360358.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
920360358.en_literal: I'm not going to let you get away with this!

965472057.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
965472057.jp_real: ベアトリクスさんもね

115547005.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
115547005.en_literal: I'm okay! I can still do this!
115547005.english: Thanks, but I know my limits.

903210121.label: PL0000_vo_SP_link_time_start
903210121.jp_real: みんな、今がチャンスだ！
